Why MP4 destroys GIF on file size
Three structural differences explain the 10 to 20 times file size gap.
First: color palette. GIF uses indexed color — up to 256 colors per frame, chose
MP4 with H.264 and WebM with VP9 use full 24-bit color (16.7 million colors) wit
Second: frame compression. GIF stores every frame independently using LZW on the
MP4 H.264 uses three frame types. I-frames are keyframes, full images every 1 to
Third: entropy coding. H.264 uses CABAC, context-adaptive binary arithmetic codi
